description_long: This object is a classic incandescent light bulb with a transparent glass envelope and a metallic screw base. The bulb features a visible tungsten filament supported by two thin wires, which are anchored to a central glass stem. The glass envelope is smooth and clear, allowing an unobstructed view of the internal filament structure. The metallic base is ribbed for grip and designed to screw into a standard socket. The overall form is rounded at the top and tapers toward the base, typical of traditional household light bulbs. There are no decorative elements or additional features beyond the functional components.
description: A clear glass incandescent light bulb with a visible filament and a metallic screw base, featuring a classic rounded shape.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full filament structure and both support wires clearly inside the transparent bulb.
description_view_1: This side view reveals the filament edge-on, making the support wires appear closer together and less distinct.
description_view_2: The rear view mirrors the front, again displaying the filament and support wires in full detail.
description_view_3: This opposite side view shows the filament edge-on, similar to view 1, with the support wires aligned closely.
